data.title: Toy Fair® in NYC on Feb 14-17 at Javits Center is the largest toy show in the Western Hemisphere, featuring hundreds of companies.
data.description: The biggest toy event in the Western Hemisphere, Toy Fair®, is scheduled to be held in New York City from February 14 to 17, 2026. It will take place at the Javits Center and feature a wide range of toy companies, including both pioneering startups and established global giants. This event will showcase the latest innovations and trends in the toy industry, attracting hundreds of participants.

data.title: Massive stibnite discovery on Globex’s property in New Brunswick, exposed over 25 metres in the Marcus Zone.
data.description: In Toronto on February 12, 2026, GLOBEX MINING ENTERPRISES INC. (GMX on Toronto Stock Exchange, G1MN on Frankfurt, Stuttgart, Berlin, Munich, Tradegate, Lang & Schwarz, LS Exchange, TTMzero, Düsseldorf, and Quotrix Düsseldorf Stock Exchanges, and GLBXF on OTCQX International in the US) announced that Antimony Resources Corp. (CSE-ATMY, OTCQB-ATMYF, FSE-K8JO) has discovered a significant deposit of stibnite (antimony) on the Marcus (West) Zone of the Bald Hill property in New Brunswick, under Globex's option. The newly identified stibnite zone, measuring over 25 meters, is believed to be distinct from the Main Zone, the primary target area that has seen successful drill programs. The Marcus Zone was uncovered during access road construction and will be easily assessible for shallow drilling.

data.title: HubSpot's stock price rallied after Q4 results, analysts cut price target: Needham - $300, BTIG - $300. Revenue up 20.4%.
data.description: HubSpot Inc (NYSE: HUBS) saw a surge in shares during early trading following the release of its fourth-quarter results. As of today, Needham analyst Joshua Reilly upheld a Buy rating but lowered the price target from $700 to $300. Meanwhile, BTIG analyst Nick Altmann also maintained a Buy rating but decreased the price target from $500 to $300. According to Needham, HubSpot experienced a 20.4% annual growth in total revenue, driven by a 20.6% increase in subscription revenue and a 12.0% rise in professional services revenue. The company's 2026 revenue outlook was provided at $3.69-$3.70 billion, anticipating an 18% growth at the midpoint, which falls below the Street's 15.3% growth forecast.

data.title: Space stocks dropped due to industry headwinds. AST SpaceMobile plummeted 15% after announcing a $1 billion convertible note offering. United Launch Alliance experienced hardware concerns with its Vulcan rocket. SpaceX IPO and AI integration also impacting sector.(Syntax: 366)
data.description: Space stocks experienced a decline on Thursday due to various industry challenges. United Launch Alliance's Vulcan rocket faced issues with a solid rocket booster, causing concerns across the industry. The space sector is also impacted by Elon Musk's commentary, potential SpaceX IPO, and increasing use of AI with orbital data. Furthermore, a major space satellite company announced a $1 billion convertible note offering, leading to a drop in the entire sector. AST SpaceMobile (ASTS) shares fell by 15% due to the convertible note announcement, causing a negative impact on the space sector as a whole. Despite the slip, ASTS stock has seen a 15% gain. Overall, the article highlights the complexities in the space sector and the influence of various factors on stock prices.

data.title: Ongwe Minerals listed on TSX Venture Exchange under "OGW". Shares trading started after takeover with Lotus Gold.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 12, 2026, Ongwe Minerals Inc. (TSX-V: OGW) has officially started trading its common shares on the TSX Venture Exchange with the symbol "OGW." This move comes after a reverse takeover deal with Lotus Gold Corporation and a simultaneous funding operation. The company sees this as a noteworthy achievement in its journey, signaling a new phase of growth and opportunity.

data.title: Forbes names Delta Dental of California one of America's Best Employers for 2026. Correction: "America's Best Midsize Employers."
data.description: Delta Dental of California has been recognized as one of America's top employers for 2026 by Forbes. The prestigious title of "America's Best Midsize Employers for 2026" was awarded to Delta Dental, showcasing the company's dedication to providing a quality work environment. This acknowledgment highlights the efforts of Delta Dental to prioritize employee satisfaction and well-being. The news was released on February 11, 2026, by Delta Dental of California through PR Newswire. This recognition further solidifies Delta Dental's commitment to being a leading employer, with a focus on fostering a positive workplace culture.

data.title: AI infrastructure outpaces crypto in the 'supercycle' race: Analysts. AI data center spending now surpasses crypto's, as Bitcoin miners invest in high-performance computing.
data.description: Investment in AI data centers is overtaking the anticipated boost in the cryptocurrency market, with Bitcoin miners directing funds towards advanced computing infrastructure. This shift is signaling a significant change in financial allocation, with a noticeable increase in resources towards high-performance computing. The evolving landscape reflects the growing importance of AI technologies, underscoring a shift in focus among investors.

data.title: Topcon secures early access to Xona's Pulsar Navigation Service, positioning itself among the first commercial customers.
data.description: Topcon Positioning Systems, based in Livermore, California, has recently entered into a commercial agreement with Xona to gain early access to Pulsar - Xona's low Earth orbit (LEO) satellite navigation constellation. This agreement solidifies Topcon as one of the initial commercial customers set to incorporate Pulsar into upcoming high-precision positioning processes. Through this letter of agreement, Topcon further demonstrates its dedication to innovation and technology advancement driven by customer needs. This collaboration marks a significant step for Topcon in advancing its positioning capabilities, showcasing its dedication to staying at the forefront of technology.

data.title: SportsMed PT opens clinic in Emerson, bringing total to 52 across NJ and CT. Expanding access to rehab and wellness.
data.description: In Richwood, New Jersey on February 12, 2026, SportsMed Physical Therapy, a prominent player in outpatient rehabilitation and wellness services, has revealed the establishment of the Emerson Clinic. With the introduction of this new facility, the company's network now encompasses a total of 52 clinics, underlining its commitment to enhancing accessibility to their services.

data.title: Convr AI® announces Eli O'Donohue as Head of Data and AI Underwriting Solutions, enhancing its AI capabilities for commercial insurance.
data.description: Chicago-based Convr AI®, a top artificial intelligence (AI) firm catering to commercial insurance entities through its underwriting platform, has revealed the appointment of Eli O'Donohue as the Head of Data and AI Underwriting Solutions on February 12, 2026. O'Donohue will take charge of leading this segment of the company.

data.title: Holistic financial planning is crucial for stability and growth, according to Precise Financial Solutions in Port Charlotte, Fla.
data.description: Precise Financial Solutions asserts the importance of a coordinated approach integrating income, investments, protection, and legacy planning. In Port Charlotte, Florida, on February 12, 2026, the company highlights the necessity of holistic financial planning for individuals aiming for enduring stability and growth in the long term.

data.title: West Hollywood's Cupid Lips Med Spa raises $60,000 for HUGS Charity at Cupid Compendium Gala.
data.description: In November 2025, the renowned West Hollywood medical spa, Cupid Lips, known for its expertise in lip enhancement and facial aesthetics, managed to raise more than $60,000 for the HUGS (Help Us Give Smiles) Foundation during its Cupid Compendium Gala fundraiser. This substantial donation will go towards providing crucial support for the foundation's mission of offering life-changing reconstructive treatments.

data.title: College Basketball Crown and Circa Resort & Casino bring back Crown Town Fan Fest at Stadium Swim during 2026 championship weekend in Las Vegas. Circa is the Official Host Hotel and Founding Partner. Agreement brokered by AEG Global Partnerships.
data.description: In Los Angeles, The College Basketball Crown and Circa Resort & Casino have revealed the comeback of Crown Town Fan Fest at Stadium Swim during the 2026 championship weekend in Las Vegas. Circa Resort & Casino, a top-notch adults-only luxury resort in Downtown Las Vegas, is the honored Founding Partner and Official Host Hotel of the College Basketball Crown. The collaboration was facilitated by AEG Global Partnerships. The event will offer one of the tournament's key fan experiences and is set to take place at Stadium Swim.

data.title: Gabrielle Harvey and Brendan Callahan are new Executive Vice Chairs at Cushman & Wakefield in Boston.
data.description: In Boston, Cushman & Wakefield has welcomed Gabrielle Harvey and Brendan Callahan as Executive Vice Chairs in the firm's Boston office. Their appointments aim to bolster the team's leadership and strategic efforts.
